text: SK Hynix Stock Drops as AI Fears Resurface - Barron's
fullText: SK Hynix dropped as investors looked to be taking some profit after a 500% gain in the past 12 months and a blockbuster U.S. listing.

text: Big banks poised to report booming revenue propelled by SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility - CNBC
fullText: Big banks are set to report booming Q2 revenue as the SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility and a rebound in commercial lending fuel Wall Street's "sweet spot."

text: A T. rex found in South Dakota could smash auction records — and possibly disappear forever - CNN

text: Senator Lindsey Graham's cause of death was an aortic tear, says medical examiner - BBC
fullText: Graham, a close Republican ally of Donald Trump, died at the age of 71 on Saturday evening.

text: Sam Neill, actor known for ‘Jurassic Park,’ dies at 78 - NBC News
fullText: Sam Neill, the genre-spanning New Zealand actor best known for his starring role in the “Jurassic Park” movies, has died, his family said Monday.

text: This free Mac app reveals the truth about your mystery USB-C cables - The Verge
fullText: WhatCable is an free Mac app, for Macs with M1 or later chips, that can test your USB-C cables and connections.

text: Pythons’ extreme biology may hold clues for treating human disease - NPR
fullText: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shrink the size of their hearts and jump start their metabolism on a dime.

text: 'Still have unfinished business to complete': Sen. Mitch McConnell gives update on health, says he is out of the hospital - WLWT
fullText: Kentucky Sen. Mitch McConnell provided a long-awaited update about his health on Sunday after being hospitalized for several weeks.

Common knee surgery may do more harm than good: "I don't know how I would defend this procedure" - CBS News
fullText: A Finnish study followed patients for 10 years after they had a popular knee surgery. For many, the pain continued or even worsened.

text: EV battery recycling has an economics problem. Colorado has a solution - NPR
fullText: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve.

text: 'Once it's gone, it's gone': How to future-proof your hearing - BBC
fullText: It's not just rocket launches and death metal concerts that lead to hearing loss. Many everyday activities can cause damage. Here's what you can do to protect your ears.

text: Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Beyoncé, Rihanna and Usher - Variety

fullText: In the days since the puzzling death of an 18-year-old, investigators have undertaken a painstaking effort to reconstruct the events that unfolded on Horn Island, a remote barrier island about 10 miles off the Mississippi coast.
